Motion For Order To Amend Default Judgmnt
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MERIWEST CREDIT UNION's Motion For Order To Amend Default Judgmnt.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to amend default judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

(Dave Marcolin(sp?) checked in before the 9:30 a.m. calendar began. At the time of the calling of this matter, counsel was no longer in court.)
